rank_rationale: #1 over #2: stage toys and guide match the 4-6m shift into longer tummy and reaching better than a plain wipe-clean mat alone.
include_rationale: By four to six months the floor becomes a proper workout space, not a quick stretch on a towel. This gym keeps tummy time interesting with reachables that change as rolling starts. The washable mat survives milk dribbles without turning the room into a plastic play zone for every awake spell.

rank_rationale: #2 over #3: sealed wipe-clean foam beats puzzle tiles for milk-and-dribble floor play.
include_rationale: Once tummy time lasts more than a minute, cold floors punish elbows and knees. A wipe-clean cushioned mat lets you join them on the floor without a giant foam puzzle. Reversible faces keep it looking intentional when visitors walk through after lunch on a busy day.

age_raw: Suitable for children of all ages (supervised)
rank_rationale: #3 over #4: patterned starter set is clearer for first-time buyers than plain tiles alone.
include_rationale: Hard tiles punish longer tummy spells once they push up and rock. Puzzle foam softens the floor without covering the whole room in one roll. Pull one tile aside after a spill and the rest of the patch stays ready for the next try on the same afternoon.

product_name: Plain Playmat Set in Navy, Sage and Cream
age_raw: Suitable for children of all ages (supervised)
rank_rationale: #4 over #5: expandable plain tiles suit growing floor use better than a second one-piece Totter colourway.
include_rationale: Busy prints can feel loud once the mat stays down all day. Plain tiles keep the floor soft while the room still looks like a living room. Add tiles later if rolling turns into crawling and the soft patch needs to grow with them.

rank_rationale: #5: second Totter colourway for print-led buyers; ranked last because Mariner already covers the wipe-clean case.
include_rationale: Some parents want the Totter wipe-clean feel but not the Mariner colours. Ludo keeps the same cushion for longer tummy sessions as rolling starts. Pick one Totter mat only; two large mats in the same home usually just fight for floor space.
